Progress update:

Completed the SPESTG-480 SonarQube cleanup for the DIA exception-handling PR.

Initial SonarQube code smell findings were addressed, including naming convention fixes, logging cleanup, single-character Contains usage, and exception-handling updates in the DIA ingestion flow. Related unit tests were updated to align with the contextual exception handling changes.

Also resolved the SonarQube quality gate coverage issue by updating the PR SonarQube pipeline to generate/import unit test coverage correctly. The test project target framework was aligned with the .NET 8 pipeline, NuGet version was pinned, and the SonarQube analysis now includes the unit test coverage output.

Validation completed:
- Local build passed
- Local unit tests passed: 15/15
- PR SonarQube pipeline passed
- PR overview now shows all required checks succeeded
- No merge conflicts reported

Remaining action:
- PR approval is still pending from Vishal
- I will do one final PR status check tomorrow morning before closing this subtask
